title: Gooey Greek Date Skewers
description: Sweet and savory skewers featuring gooey cheese, dates, and a hint of greek flavor.

ingredients.name: Gooey cheese
ingredients.notes: Any type of gooey cheese works well

ingredients.name: Pitted dates
ingredients.notes: Fresh or dried dates both work well

ingredients.name: Skewers
ingredients.notes: Soak in water for at least 30 minutes before use

instructions: Soak skewers in water for at least 30 minutes.
Thread a date, a piece of cheese, and a sprinkle of parsley onto each skewer.
Brush with olive oil and season with salt.
Grill for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cheese is melted and dates are caramelized.
Serve hot with a dollop of greek yogurt.
